title: Home
description: With this datapack you can sit at home and if you are far from your base you can teleport back.
body:
# Home
With this datapack you can sit at home and if you are far from your base you can teleport back.

![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b4026e6f087054cf4d4e380d4822e3363703b1d6.png)


**Thanks for 2k downloads!**
#

## Picture /trigger sethome

![/trigger sethome](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c94b737439df57fa48002bcbede403da032c31c.png)

## Picture /trigger delhome

![/trigger delhome](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14adb9f210c65468b60ccb50c53ce5c5330cdfde.png)

<details>

<summary>Commands:</summary>
 
```
 /trigger sethome to set your home.

 /trigger delhome to delete your home.
```

</details>

# Important!

**This is a reupload of my old Modrinth account [x_halo](https://modrinth.com/user/x_halo)**.

```

```
